libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Use an in-process Vert.x HttpServer as the target server; avoid external network services. Ensure the generated Gradle test setup passes these nativeTest runtime system properties for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 on JDK 25: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative; the properties are inferred from the resolved Netty 4.2.x dependency and the existing 5.0.0 test setup.
Optional Vert.x modules such as vertx-auth-oauth2 are not required for core WebClient coverage unless tests intentionally exercise optional OAuth-specific APIs.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency or Docker service is needed for meaningful Vert.x Web Client coverage, but Vert.x 5.0.1 resolves Netty 4.2.2.Final, whose Java 25 behavior requires explicit unsafe/reflection system properties for native-image runtime tests.
